tasks.title: Desktop WebView Integration
tasks.description: Implement actual WebView component per PRD 13. Currently desktop.rs uses wry for WebView but only spawns browser when desktop feature is off. When desktop feature is enabled, spawn_webview_thread creates WebView but doesn't properly integrate with app lifecycle.
test_criteria: WebView successfully spawns when desktop feature is enabled
WebView properly shares state with TUI/server
WebView loads local HTTP server URL correctly
WebView integrates with desktop mode lifecycle (start/stop)
tasks.impl_notes: IMPLEMENTED - Created WebViewManager struct with proper lifecycle management. WebView is created with WebViewManager::new(url, title), runs in background thread, and properly shuts down via stop() and wait_until_stopped() when server stops. Drop implementation ensures cleanup. State shared via existing ServerState (event_bus, storage, etc.).

tasks.title: JSONC Error Messages Clarity

Error messages are clear and actionable
tasks.impl_notes: Enhanced JsoncError with source line extraction and caret display in crates/core (config/jsonc.rs)

tasks.title: Circular Variable Expansion Detection
tasks.description: Add detection algorithm for circular references in variable expansion
test_criteria: Error message clearly indicates which variables are involved in the cycle
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented circular variable expansion detection in crates/config - Fixed test bugs in opencode-core config tests (incorrect variable paths), added integration tests in opencode-config/tests/circular_variable_tests.rs

tasks.title: Deprecated Fields Planning
tasks.description: Plan removal of deprecated fields: mode, tools, theme, keybinds in v4.0 major version
test_criteria: Deprecation warnings added for mode, tools, theme, keybinds fields
Fields marked for removal in next major version
tasks.impl_notes: Added #[deprecated] attributes to AgentConfig.mode and AgentMode enum. Added check_deprecated_fields() to detect and warn about mode, tools, theme, keybinds in raw JSON. Deprecation warnings appear during build.

tasks.title: Multiline Input Terminal Support
tasks.description: Implement Shift+Enter for new line in terminal input widget
test_criteria: Shift+Enter inserts new line in input
tasks.impl_notes: Done (Iteration 7) - Implementation in input_widget.rs

tasks.title: Session Sharing Between Interfaces
tasks.description: Implement cross-interface session synchronization for TUI, CLI, Web, and Desktop interfaces
test_criteria: Session created in one interface is accessible from another
Session state stays synchronized across interfaces
No data loss when switching between interfaces
tasks.impl_notes: IMPLEMENTED (Iteration 7) - Fixed cross-interface session sharing: (1) Modified Session::sessions_dir() to respect OPENCODE_DATA_DIR environment variable, (2) Modified SessionSharing::list_sessions() to scan disk for sessions not in cache, (3) Modified quick new-session to sync sessions after creation via save_session_records(). All 28 session sharing tests pass.

tasks.title: Project VCS Worktree Root Distinction
tasks.description: Distinguish between project root and VCS worktree root in crate/core
test_criteria: VCS worktree root correctly identified when inside worktree
Both paths accessible when they differ
tasks.impl_notes: Added find_git_repository and detect_worktree_root_from_subdirectory functions to traverse upward and detect worktrees from subdirectories. Added 3 new tests with vcs prefix.

tasks.title: Result Caching Invalidation
tasks.description: Implement result caching with proper invalidation for tools

Cache is invalidated when source files change
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented - CachedToolResult with TTL and dependency tracking, invalidation methods (invalidate_cache_for_tool, invalidate_all_cache, invalidate_cache_for_file, invalidate_cache_for_files), has_stale_dependencies for automatic invalidation on file change
